title: Unsure how to approach CS50? Carter Zenke answers.
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School. The course is taught by David J. Malan and maintains active communities across Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other platforms.
writeup: This video features Carter Zenke answering questions about how to approach CS50, Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming. It covers the course's availability through edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School, and notes that the course is taught by David J. Malan. It points to the active CS50 communities across Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other platforms.
